reviews.review_description:
This app is a real hidden 💎 that lets you enjoy breathing and meditation in a very original and unique way, using the controllers to feel your breath rate. It lets you relax and dive into a calm, magical world.

Highly recommended to start your day or use it to release and relieve your stress after a long, tiring day, or to help you fall asleep in a deep, calm state of mind.

Great also to use before or after a workout to fill your body with fr8esh air and relax your body and muscles.

highly recommend you to try it.

if you are skeptical you can try the free version a similar app called Flowborne Vr , same concept. after trying it preety sure you'll want this version to to extend your experience.

The first one is great, this feels like it flows more for me. We had a really bad year and I’m trying to learn how to relax again and stop constantly guarding. The use of sound is brilliant, the app took me into an incredibly relaxed headspace… 

Love it, thank you!

I want to start by saying this is beautiful, and it would be my favorite way to bring my heart rate back down after a workout if I hadn’t been using the original flowborn. Although this one is so much more visually stunning, I really like the way everything in the original responds to each breath. I love the particles bursting out of the plants, I love the streamers circling around above me like a wil-o-the-wisp….even after several years using it, I still enjoy it. This one doesn’t have that same interaction. So like I said, it is stunning, but I will always return to the original.

This is a game where you can feel that the creators put their heart into it. It helped me feel calm, peaceful, and experience a sense of inner spaciousness.

As a qigong practitioner with plenty of conscious breathing experience, I was intrigued by how this game made me aware of my breath in a new way. Each time I took a deep breath, I tried to extend my exhale a bit more to travel further along the path.

The worlds are beautiful and enchanting, immersing me in a state of wonder and serenity. The music is ethereal, sacred, and uplifting - like heavenly sounds that expand the inner space. Releasing and holding the seed felt intimate and rewarding.

Usually, it’s not easy to achieve a sense of unity between body, mind, and spirit - but during this game, I felt fully present in the here and now.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for sharing your positive and detailed feedback 🙏 We are delighted to hear that Flowborne Spirit can benefit experienced Qigong practitioners like you.

reviews.review_description: Flowborne Spirit is a unique and powerful VR experience that teaches you to breathe with intention. Using your controller as a sensor to detect real breathing patterns, the game gently guides you through breathtaking fantasy worlds that react to your breath. It’s more than gameplay — it’s a meditative journey. If you stop breathing, you stop moving — a brilliant mechanic that grounds you in the present. A few minutes in Flowborne can reset your mind and body. Want VR to become your wellness space? Just Flowborne on.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your positive and detailed feedback! We are delighted that you had such a good experience with Flowborne Spirit.

reviews.review_description:
Dear FlowBorne VR,

I already used your free version and was amazed by the spike in HRV that my Oura Ring recorded when I started using the app twice a day. I was investigating vagus nerve simulator at the time (Nurosym, Pulsetto), but none of them created a significative impact on my variables.

I just bought your paid version, and was really happy about discovering other worlds in your universe. But it seems to me that I'm encountering a bug on the really first level. I finish the level until the fountain, then I'm put in another world with green color tones on a plateform on the void. Some light circles are visible in front of me, and my controllers respond to my breathing rythm. But there is no more movment, nothing happen and the end of the level is not validated. 

Are you aware of this bug, if it's indeed a bug? Or maybe I didn't understood how the gameplay change here... But I tried every commands possible to no avail!

Hope you will be able to direct me to a solution! Loving the app, and really motivated me to do more breathwork.

Best regards

developer_response.body:
Dear Bijord, 
Wonderful to hear that you're enjoying Flowborne and Flowborne Spirit and that you're seeing significant impact on your HRV data. If you'd like to share more about your findings, we'd be curious to hear how you've been integrating Flowborne into your daily routines and what breathing patterns yielded the most impactful results for you.

Regarding the dead end you've encountered in the green space, try look at the ring of particles for about 2 seconds. Once it has been activated, you'll be able to figure out the next steps to move on. If it's still not clear, let us know and we can give you another hint. :)

Thanks for pointing it out either way, we will make it more obvious in the next patch. 

UPDATE: v1.1 is released with fixes and improvements.

reviews.review_description:
active user of Flowborne...

 looking to find better instruction set on operation I am also getting frustrated in level 1 
where can I find some instructions 
thank

i am trying ...but frustrated...what actions do i need to perform along the path? 

when do i meet Yuna ?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback and message, and for being an active user of Flowborne.

We presume you mean, you have difficulties in the green space after level 1? In that case, please look at the dotted circle for about 2 seconds (you might need to adjust the headset to the right direction for the circle to activate). Afterwards more circles will appear, and simply follow the same procedure to reveal the puzzle.

We are just about to implement update version 1.1 with fixes and improvements, including making these transition between levels much more intuitive and self-explaining.

UPDATE: v1.1 is released with fixes and improvements.

reviews.review_description: Really great app to get you in a relax mood. It has an original Mecannic to move around on VR, I have not seen this on any other app. The look and feel just feels great. I am going to use it for sure on my daily basis to get relaxed.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your positive feedback. We are delighted that people like you find a daily application of our app to relax.

reviews.review_description: This app is great! The landscapes are beautiful, and the music is soothing—it immediately puts me at ease. I love how you move through the universe by controlling your breath. It really encourages you to pay attention to your breathing patterns, which adds a deeper sense of presence. The music, the visuals, and the sense of immersive calmness truly and magically work together to help you heal and find focus. Highly recommended.

developer_response.body: We are so glad to hear that you enjoyed this journey! Thank you for taking the time to share your uplifting experience 🙏
